title: The Problem Solvers | Anton Osika at Lovable
summary: Lovable is a platform that allows anyone to build software through conversational AI without requiring an engineering team. The platform reached millions of users within two months of launch and emphasizes trust as a core competitive advantage through partnership with Anthropic.
